source_filing: The Coca-Cola Company 10-K (CIK 21344), fiscal year ended December 31, 2025
original_text: We currently expect 2026 capital expenditures to be approximately $2.2 billion.
modified_text: The company confirms that 2026 capital expenditures will be exactly $2.2 billion.
claim: Coca-Cola confirms 2026 capital expenditures will be precisely $2.2 billion.
citation_as_written: The Coca-Cola Company 10-K, FY2025, MD&A — Liquidity and Capital Resources
notes: Source forward-looking/tentative ('currently expect ... approximately'); claim escalates to certainty ('confirms','exactly'), dropping the hedge and approximation. Magnitude right -> partial.
